title: Rally

markdown:
# Rally

As a [[bonus_action]], you can expend one Superiority Die to bolster the resolve of a companion. Choose an ally of yours within 30 feet of yourself who can see or hear you. That creature gains [[temporary_hit_points]] equal to the Superiority Die roll plus half your Fighter level (round down).
